FERTILIZER - STEEL
MV TIGER JILIN
----------------
OPEN DJIBOUTI
: 10~15/JAN, 2026
ETA SANTOS & RECALADA
: 8~14/FEB, 2026
DWT 63414.5/13.30M SSW / TPC 62.3 / 2015 BUILT
CLASS LR, HK FLAG
GT/NT 36,449/21600
L/B/D 199.90/32.26/18.50M
GRAIN CAPACITY 78771CBM,
CRANES: 4X30MT
GRABS: 4X(6-12) CUB MTRS SELFWEIGHT: 9T
FUEL CONSUMPTION
PORT IDLE/WORKING ABOUT 3.5 MT / 5.50 MT IFO / DAY
AT SEA(UNDER GOOD WEATHER CONDITION UPTO BEAUFORT FORCE 4 AND DOUGLAS
SEA STATE 3 AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE BY SWELL/ADVERSE CURRENTS) :
BALLAST ABOUT 14.5KT ON ABOUT 27.2 MT IFO/DAY
LADEN ABOUT 14KT ON ABOUT 30.0 MT IFO/DAY
ECO SPEED OWNER GTEE:
BALLAST: ABOUT 12.5 KNOTS ON ABOUT 18MT IFO/DAY
LADEN: ABOUT 12.0 KNOTS ON ABOUT 20 MT IFO/DAY
BALLAST: ABOUT 13.5 KNOTS ONABOUT 24.5MT IFO/DAY
LADEN: 13.0KNOST ON ABOUT 25.5MTS IFO/DAY.
MGO CONSUMPTION: 0.1MT PER DAY BOTH IN PORT AND AT SEA.
WHILE BALLASTING OR DEBALLASTING OPERTION, ADDITIONAL 1.5MT IFO PER DAY.
"ABOUT" MEANS HAVING AN ALLOWANCE OF 0.5KNOT ON SPEED AND 5% ON BUNKERS CONSUMPTION, BOTH IN OWNERS FAVOUR.
AUXILLARY ENGINE CONSUMPTION ARE INCLUDED IN ALL THE CONUMPTION FIGURES ABOVE.
BUNKER QUALITY:-
BUNKER SPECIFICATION - THE BUNKER SUPPLIED TO BE IN ACCORDANCE WITH:
FUEL OIL: ISO 8217:2010 - RMG380 / MFO380
GASOIL: ISO 8217:2010 - DMA / MGO
ALL FUEL DELIVERED TO THE VESSEL HAS TO BE MINERAL OIL PRODUCT AND NOT TO CONTAIN TAR OIL AND/OR INORGANIC ACID SUBSTANCES,
TO BE FREE OF ANY CONTAMINATION BY NON-MINERAL OIL, CHEMICALS AND LUBOILS AND ALWAYS OF STABLE AND HOMOGENEOUS NATURE
AND WITH ENGINE MAKERS RECOMMENDATIONS.
MAIN ENGINE TYPE: MAN B&W 5S60ME
CARGO HOLDS ARE CO2 FITTED.
A-60 BULKHEAD ARE INSTALLED BETWEEN CARGO HOLD AND ENGINE ROOM.
(ALL DETAILS ABOUT)
BEST REGARDS / HJ
